title: Add delta freshness invalidation
goal: Allow old answer declarations to be checked against newer snapshots and classify citation validity/drift without automatic re-dump.

acceptance.assertion: Old citations are classified as valid, drifted, missing or not_comparable.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Checking does not create snapshots or fetch Git state.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Existing freshness statuses remain visible and are not silently normalized.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Tests cover unchanged, moved/drifted, missing and not-comparable cases.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

metadata.created_from_plan: RepoBrief Frontdoor and Grounding Verifier v1
metadata.unblocked_by: RBGV-V1-T007 verified via Lenskit PR #937; dependencies RBGV-V1-T002 and RBV1-T006 are verified.
